When you stand in one place and see three cellular towers around you,
forget about instruments, get out of there ASAP.
If you short of $$, sell that instrument.

Any DHEA that you can get is better than none.
I use one made by lef.org (because it is least expensive).
It is in form of pills, gel caps with powder in it.
I buy 100mg gelcaps. (50mg would cost me same as 100mg).
I eat three of them, every day, since I retired 18 years ago. I am 75yo now. Had short periods when I stopped them for hacking, my DHEAs dropped like a stone from over 400 to below 100.
Had a time that I had to use 4 pills.
Dr Kruse during some of his hacks used 500mg/day
lef.org recommends
350-500 μg/dL men
So, when you start supplementing with DHEA it is long term.
Careful about laboratory ranges for DHEAs. They are age adjusted, worthless.
When I had 95, I was just right within recommended range for my age.

When you are falling on your face tired, go out, take shirt off, let the sun shine on your skin (even if it is cloudy and chilly). No oils or anything on the skin.
At this time, with very low vit D levels you do not want long times sun exposures, all at once.
So, watch out for the weekends when you may have better opportunity for sunbathing. Can't rush this things.

....
My grandson loves sardines.
Sardines if in the olive oil are unappealing to me, I am adding some anchovies.
Eggs are highly underrated, everybody in your family can eat (whole) 6/day, everyday,
preferably drink them raw. At this stage do not worry about organic, free range etc.
Go to Asian stores, look for beef tendons, chicken feet, good source of collagen.

....
ASI is salivary test. Gold standard. It tests two ideas at once.
Free Cortisol level and change of cortisol level throughout the day.

My example was base on hormonal levels by weight, in the blood.

When your situation changes and you will want to test your hormones,
make sure to not waste your precious $$ and do test of other hormones in saliva.

....

### dantothep — 2015-12-12T13:29:49+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-jigsaw.12556/post-183955>

Long time since updating, i'm not an avid one for posting all the time. Have generally been good and no repeat of the brain issues faced this time last year, however I came down with a cough as everyone else did. It stuck around for a few people in the family, I tried my best as one does to fight it without penicillin, CT, 660nm UFO, outdoor light, indoor black light. Looked like it was going (after a 4 week struggle) but then turned into a lovely dose of Pneumonia (diag Chest Xray), and out came the anitbiotics.

Starting to feel better now after 4 days of a 7 days but need to put together a plan of recovery.

\-Vit D improve
\-gut flora
\-improve my breathing

My Vit D must be in the tank as the past 3 years i get ill on the same week every year.

So to build the Vit D I have four options as I see it in the UV deficient UK:

1\. Escape to somewhere in the tropics or Southern hemisphere for two weeks. Not in budget but would be nice.
2\. Tanning beds with CT pre and post, not sure how to safely get the UV in the eye, JK alluded to it in another post. POssibly do this for a 6 x 10 min sessions over two weeks. Should have done this before the last Vit D in UK in Oct (to avoid seasonal mismatch) and will next year. This is more of an emergency repair job.
3\. Use these for a few hours each day - [http://www.exo-terra.com/en/products/solar\_glo.php](http://www.exo-terra.com/en/products/solar_glo.php)
4\. Build a UFO light with 298 to 316 nm LED (dependant on avail), thinking as this would be more targeted as I read some where that this was the best band for minimizing and maximising D production.

Gut flora will improve with Sauerkraut and other pickles.

I have found an experienced buteyko breathing teacher near me, i'm looking at this as lung physio, also considering using a heart math to improve HRV.

Any thoughts most welcome as always.

Dan

LOOOL Jack you need to learn your geography. Northern point in south africa is within the tropics, southern point is a whooping 35 deg south. South Africa is where there is about the most sun intensity right now I think.(sunshine hours, solar angle, day length). And one of the sunniest country in the world in general.
Southern europe is barely ok. (rest of europe is not Ok). Still pretty low levels if you consider the whole world.

I've got the big issues with dopamin in winter(not motivated to do anything.. you know), and only so much can be done with mitigation, so I am trying to check where to go for the rest of my life in term of seasons. .

Another big thing for me is... We europeans-americans are pretty rich. How hard is it for us to move seasonally where the gdp per capita is 10 to 100 times less basically... Not very hard compared to the opposite..

For a quick escape you can go to morroco or canaries(30 deg north) (from paris) for about 15-30€ with ryanair.

### dantothep — 2016-07-05T14:11:15+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-jigsaw.12556/post-197873>

It's been a long time since i posted. Following the principles taught by JK (and experimenting with various hacks) brought me out of a dark place, and post Pneumonia (and moving from our office with its <50m proximity to 3 cell phones masts in March) that i found myself in better health than i have experienced a long time even in London. I trialled the idea post March of working from home, found out it worked and then decided to leave London for Southern Spain, for less EMF more UV and a more laidback way of life (v. cheap seafood helps too).

Now after 5 weeks of living here; i was expecting to feel amazing - but i don't. In fact i feel about 60% as bad as when i started this diary. My wife and kids feel the benefit just not me.

Symptoms:

0\. Swelling of joints esp. hands and feet. not consistently.

1\. Brain fog

2\. Low energy esp. after food (fat being the worst offender) L

3\. Eczema on hands and feet

4\. Leaky gut issues, alternating Bristol chart; abdominal distension, gas.

5\. Feeling of time being speeded up, the day disappearing.

6\. Nocturia

7\. Lost some muscle mass.

Environment:

· UV Index 7-12 most days

· Temp 28-35c (82-95f)

· LF EMF – Less than 0.2 mGuass in the whole house.

· RF EMF – AV between 0.003-0.0110 mW/m2

· Grounding most of the day on marble, or on grass in garden.

· Still in front of a PC in a room with two large windows for approx. 7 hrs/day 5/days/week. w/BluTechs.

· Take about 1-2.5 hours outside a day in weekdays and 6hrs plus in weekends (more than London), from 0730-2130. Mostly without anything other than shorts, not burning, tanning evenly.

· Heart Math scores are still pretty high.

I thought at first it was a mismatch as i fell into the Spanish lifestyle, late lunch/dinner etc. Realised i didn't have a few staples in my diet that i know are beneficial for my N=1, bone broths, turmeric etc. So I adjusted to a more quantum meal pattern and added a few of things back into my diet; which has helped but not enough. Still a few things missing, CT (which I was only doing once a week submerged in London, which worked better than 7 days a week for me, still occasional CFB post exercise/pre Red light), and Epsom salt baths.

The weekends are mostly spent on the beach, after which I always feel much better.

In southern Europe most of the coast is dominated by hills that fall into the coast line, creating very beautiful and dramatic scenery. Trouble is that gives you two options, you live in a fairly congested coast with the nnEMF that it brings, or you live in the hills. I gambled that less EMF but slight elevation was a more optimal choice. I went from 100m in London to 230m here near Malaga.

Of course I have re-read:

[https://www.jackkruse.com/ubiquination-1-bio-hacking-altitude-suicide-loss-muscle-mass/](https://www.jackkruse.com/ubiquination-1-bio-hacking-altitude-suicide-loss-muscle-mass/)

[https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.p...ltitude-ubiquination-one-is-live.12990/page-1](https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/bio-hacking-altitude-ubiquination-one-is-live.12990/page-1)

[https://www.jackkruse.com/tensegrity-7-black-hole-sun-come/](https://www.jackkruse.com/tensegrity-7-black-hole-sun-come/)

So I’m guessing I’m pseudohypoxic, my mito have become less condensed, lost tensegrity and are now effluxing Ca+, which is preventing the conversion to sulfates in my skin; this time from the change in Alt. rather than the nnEMF soup from London.

If I tested for BUN/Cr ratio and Vit D I’m guessing these markers would show me as being pretty low redox.

Is this just an Adjustment Phase to altitude, how do I speed up the adjustment by slowing down time other than the 5 min 660nm light?

CT – in order to submerge I really need to test myself the water source for fluoride, anyone got any ideas on how to test this? I know that Malaga city was fluoridated, but its 35 mins drive from here, so we are probably on a different reservoir.

So did i bet wrong on the Altitude being better than nnEMF soup? Any other hack for altitude/ideas/feedback much appreciated as always….

P.s. Haven’t read the Time blogs as yet due to being time poor (oh the irony).

### dantothep — 2016-07-07T22:04:56+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-jigsaw.12556/post-198028>

If it is this study - [http://ntp.niehs.nih.gov/results/areas/cellphones/index.html](http://ntp.niehs.nih.gov/results/areas/cellphones/index.html)

Then it is basically irrelevant to my environment, because:

1\. It utilises old GSM technology which differs to current models for the multiplexing and packet switching of data, for LTE/4G/3G/Blutooth/wifi/etc
2\. They beamed 9 hours a day of RF at the rats - no one uses their phone for this length of time. Definitely no one in this group . I don't even use a cell phone anywhere near mito dense organs.

Best comment on the study:

Cellphone makers are desperate to enable more and more "sleep cycles" in which all radios power down, because this is one of the best methods of offering a tolerably long battery life. Yes, a phone checks in regularly, but if there's little data to transmit, it rapidly sleeps for the majority of the time. You can hear some of the RF output when you put your cellphone near an audio amplifier, it sounds like morse code buzzing. You can trigger more of it by calling the phone, or downloading data to it. But most of the time, like near 100%, it does not emit that strong RF.

Also, NO, cellphones do not operate in the same band as microwave ovens, well, specifically, the cellular radios don't, but yeah, the wifi radio found in modern smartphones does use 2.4GHz. But these radios are used over shorter ranges <100 meters, and are lower power than the cellular radios. And NO, cellular frequencies don't warm your meat, but Wifi's 2.4GHz wifi signals theoretically do, because that is a resonating frequency of water. Which is also why microwave ovens heat foot at 2.4GHz. RF needs to be precise multiples of 2.4GHz to resonate our wet human meat, so cellular frequencies of 700, 800. 900, 1900, 2100, 2700 MHz, etc. do NOT resonate and heat us.

Radiation like Chernobyl is NOTHING like RF radios. You are talking about sub-atomic high-energy radioactive particles, and comparing them to WiFi, that suggests a lack of comprehension. If my phone were ANYTHING like radioactive fallout, I'd throw it in the ocean today.

The human body is not composed of water only and therefore a range of microwave frequencies are absorbed by proteins, lipids, etc... Therefore, cellphones have the same heating effect as ovens. However, it is to be noted that many studies show that there are non-thermal effects which are known to hinder enzymes from functioning properly. The enzymes which protect and which repair DNA, if hindered, can indirectly result in DNA damage, which is the first stage in the development of cancer. Another non-thermal effect is the generation of Reactive Oxygen Species (ROS) due to the stimulation of Voltage-Gated Calcium Channels in cells. ROS are known to damage DNA and other cell components.

# Thread: Conflicting advice regarding timing of BlueBlocker use
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/conflicting-advice-regarding-timing-of-blueblocker-use.12559/>
**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 61

### Hope2Learn — 2015-01-08T14:57:21+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/conflicting-advice-regarding-timing-of-blueblocker-use.12559/post-152089>

Hi all, I have a question. Each person I ask gives a different reply, and Jack's book and blog posts have not given me a definitive answer either, so I will ask here.

This is about blue blockers and the time of day you should wear them.

BACKGROUND:
Where I live, the sun rises at 7:30am and sets at 4:30pm this time of year.
BUT
Where I live, we have only 15% sunny days and 85% cloudy, such that the sun does not make its' way through sufficiently to light the inside of our home, which is situated such that the sun does not shine directly in any of our windows any time of day or night.

This being the case, we use artificial light indoors from wake to sleep regardless of time of year, otherwise it is just too dark inside the house to accomplish anything.

This being the case, I find I have three options regarding blue blocker use, and I do not know which one is correct:

1\. Wear blue blockers beginning at sunset at 4:30pm.

2\. Wear blue blockers from the time I wake at 5:30am until sunrise at 7:30am. Take them off until 4:30pm and then put them back on.

3\. Wear blue blockers during all waking hours due to always having blue/artificial light during waking hours almost without exception. (In which case I assume blue light is actually damaging to one's rods and cones, for this to be the recommendation. If this is accurate I would like to know since I already have glaucoma. BUT using them the past few days has already made my sleep much, much worse.. perhaps because of the lack of sunlight around here my body just thought it was time to hibernate all day and by nighttime it was over it?)

Can anyone help me to figure this out?

I thought at first that I just put them on in the evening to help my body realize it's technically sundown and time to produce melatonin, etc.

However I have gotten conflicting replies to my query on my blog regarding this subject so, I leave it to you all to weigh in.

Thanks!

### Jack Kruse — 2015-01-08T15:28:56+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/conflicting-advice-regarding-timing-of-blueblocker-use.12559/post-152092>

Natural sunlight is not the enemy. No idea why you would think it is........it is fake light that is after sunset.

### Hope2Learn — 2015-01-08T15:50:27+0200

> Natural sunlight is not the enemy. No idea why you would think it is........it is fake light that is after sunset.

I don't think natural sunlight is the enemy. In fact I just told a friend this morning that my chances of getting skin cancer is practically nil due to something I read that you wrote.

I must have misspoken or given the wrong idea above, I'm sorry.

I love natural sunlight. I just happen to live in an area that doesn't get much/any, especially in winter. We're in the top five most cloudy/least sunlit cities in the USA here, if I recall correctly. I wish that were not the case, believe me!

(as a child I would curl up in sunlight like a dog, happily laying on the floor taking it all in.. well who am I kidding, I still try to do this in whatever way I can manage when the sun DOES creep through the clouds... I was born on the jersey shore and spent my first 3.5 years on the beach, in the sun, in the ocean water. We then moved here and things haven't been "right" since... I've always believed it was due to light and water, simplified. Diet doesn't help.)

Fake light AFTER SUNSET.. that is what I was looking for, thank you!

Yes, I will buy a membership as soon as I can but I bought two copies of the book last week, an EMF meter, and blue blockers, and still have to spend $99 on 23andme testing, not to mention am meeting with my doctor today about ordering bloodwork (I'm in NY, it's a pain here) and who knows how much of THAT will be covered.... so I just simply cannot just yet.)

(random musing on this point - about two weeks ago I got out of the shower and looked in the mirror and there was a dark line from my belly button downward. JUST like when I was very pregnant. I can never remember if this is from HGH or HCG, but I went out of the bathroom and gave my husband hell and told him to be sure that none of whatever he's up to affects me ... he's very secretive about needles, vials, pills, and creams and refuses to discuss any of it, but becomes an absolute dangerous horror every so often... when I finally had to call 911 a couple of months ago I told him you stop all of this NOW or we're through. He said he had to taper off of it but wouldn't discuss what "it" was. He has since gained prolly 15-20 pounds so hopefully he's off of it. But this brings me to another question... how do pheramones affect hormones? If he is taking a ton of testosterone, will his pheremones change and affect me? Because Ii can ALWAYS Tell what he's up to because of how MY mood changes..... and I've always assumed it's pheremones. Legit thought process? If so, is this possibly why our daughter got her period at age TEN.. and 3 months? I mean she was barely ten, wtf.)

### JanSz — 2015-01-09T20:10:03+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/conflicting-advice-regarding-timing-of-blueblocker-use.12559/post-152240>

> [Inger said:](/goto/post?id=152128)
>
> Is your hubby a bodybuilder, Hope? How does he look...? You should be able to tell from that i think? You mean the hormones affects his mood?
>
> The boyfriends uses some testosteron cream.... but he is very open about it and uses only a little... i rather would have him do CT but he refuses to... well. he loves nude tanning tho so if we are still together when comes spring i will have him tan nude all the time
>
> I can never say no to oxy... morning... day... evening... night.... it always feel good.....

Tell your boyfriend that when using testosterone it is all or nothing proposition.
Adding testosterone suppresses natural production.
If he adds only a little, he may end up with less testosterone than he had before he started supplementation.

Testosterone cream is rather bad idea. Creams rarely deliver testosterone to the blood stream in sufficient way.
Testosterone gels are the way to go. Specially 1-2% gels.
Likely Androgel 1.6% or 1% are the best, but other may work too.

Good gels are expensive.
Most guys (not all) can use injectable testosterones. Cypionate, Enanthate, Nebido.
In Finland Nebido may be available.
Nebido is good product but it have a problem, manufacturer devised protocol that is bad.
They recommend 4mL injectons once every 10-12 weeks, real bad idea.
Each injection should be smaller but much more overall.
On average man needs (100-200)mg/week, plus injections must be properly spaced.
About 2x/week for Cypionate or Enantathe and every 10-15 days for Nebido.

When supplementing with testosterone natural production stops because pituitary sees testosterone increasing, so it slows LH and FSH production.
If that last a while, most guys will see their testicles and scrotum atrophy (to nothing).
To protect testicles and scrotum man must use HCG injections.
HCG is similar to LH.

Overall TRT must follow its required rules or guy can get hurt.

...

### JanSz — 2015-01-09T20:40:58+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/conflicting-advice-regarding-timing-of-blueblocker-use.12559/post-152246>

Per my understanding, the original question on this thread was that
during a day time (sunrise to sunset)
there is not enough natural light, outside and inside the house,
how to substitute this deficit?

I assume that suggesting change of geographic location is not what OP is looking for.
\----------------------------------------------------

For number of years my DW had tropical saltwater aquarium (in New Jersey).
Corals, sponges and other marine life must have equatorial environment or they would die.
IIRC most of her aquarium life was from Fiji.
Among other problems, lighting is one of the problems there to solve.
There is plenty of lighting and other solutions that have been solved and animals in aquarium will quickly inform if the attempted solution was correct.

[Hope2Learn](http://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?members/hope2learn.12220/) possibly you can use some of the lighting solutions suggested here:

[http://www.marinedepot.com/Fiji\`s\_Best\_Saltwater\_Aquarium\_Live\_Rock\_-Captive\_Purity-CP9113-FISSLK-vi.html](http://www.marinedepot.com/Fiji%60s_Best_Saltwater_Aquarium_Live_Rock_-Captive_Purity-CP9113-FISSLK-vi.html)
**Aquarium Lighting**
[http://www.marinedepot.com/aquarium-lighting.html](http://www.marinedepot.com/aquarium-lighting.html)

He says he puts it on his shoulders.. and it makes him feel good. They are prescription only... but he got them from a friend..... he says. I told him i will kiss his shoulders a lot and i might grow a beard
I am gonna watch the testicles closely.. So far they look and feel normal to me. I will tell him about what you have told me here. I already said to him if he uses that gel he has to go to the doc first and test his hormones, cause otherwise he might just do damage... but he does not seem to be that guy who likes to go to the doc too much... he says i am his nurse.. oh man.. i told him, yeah, then you have to listen to me too, dear! But ice baths he takes not! Nude tanning will be the medicine i fear cause that he likes

### Hope2Learn — 2015-01-10T15:12:19+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/conflicting-advice-regarding-timing-of-blueblocker-use.12559/post-152314>

> [Inger said:](/goto/post?id=152310)
>
> Gosh..... i am starting to worry a bit if the boyfriend is into this stuff too. He said he is not... but I need to be aware and watch how this evolves......

I really hope not. I'm sure not everyone is affected the same way. My husband swears that he isn't affected by it whatsoever and that his moods are my fault but when he gets "like that" I can tell from the minute I walk in the door ans look at him that it's going to be a scary psychotic couple of days. The air about him is charged differently. He holds himself differently like a man entering into a fight situation. He has controlled rage in his eyes and his jaw at those times. He will set down a coffee cup and it will shatter on the table and he will say he didn't do it hard, and look genuinely confused.. things like that.. but then kick the door open and break the entire frame because the door was locked AND the deadbolt was locked, and he'll just kick the whole thing open like it's nothing.... because of the insane anger.. I can ask what did I do, and he will quote something from 20 years ago and insist it just happened today, and become extremely confused and agitated when I try to defend myself...

well these things I pray are behind me now. I can't live this way. It's been a bad number of years. The name on the vials I found is not listed in Jansz's post. I had looked it up online when I first saw them and all the results that came up were steroid/bodybuilding results. It made me really sad and hurt and upset because the same day I would find a new needle and a vial in a new place, I would ask him about it and he would lie to my face and say I don't know what I'm talking about.

Yes, this relationship has issues.
But it's really very difficult for me to even talk about, especially with my face attached to the post, and probably pretty risky too so I don't want to focus on the soul-crushing aspect of this situation (which like I said has hopefully somewhat resolved, although he had a bigtime meltdown two days ago again of a different but related sort.. I wish he would just be normal).

But it is worth bringing up here because you all understand these things and I do not. I accused him the other day of putting the liquid hcg that I found the empty container for in his dresser into my coffee without me knowing it awhile back... I had gone through a period of losing a shitload of weight fast and radiating heat out my core and extreme libido increase, hair on my upper lip and big toes, and my breast tissue completely disappeared.

I ended up going to a ton of specialists and having tons of testing and scans done and even got breast implants ot replace hte missing tissue after some time because I was bewildered about what was going on with me after being so completely normal and predictable my whole life.

At first I thought he was doing something that caused his pheremones to increase which I thought my body was reacting to but now I really keep wondering if he wasn't giving me something. Every time I'd go out of town for a day or two I'd feel so much better. If he did do that to me to try to make my sex drive greater, it backfired on him becuase since that time I"ve had none at all.

I hope I'm nothing but paranoid when it comes to that part but I dont' think I am. At the same time I had a lady come up to me randomly in a store and ask waht gym I go to because she said my arms were awesome. I was like "um I don't work out but thanks!".... at one point I gave my daughter a pat on her shoulder and she got very upset and said it hurt and went into her room to be alone. I was confused, I said I only just pattted you! ... same time frame I did a lot of work with trees and wood up on our hill, dragging brush around and stuff... things that if I tried it now I don't know if I could even do it, I'm only 5'3" and back then I was only 115 pounds. Crazy.

### Hope — 2015-01-10T15:27:49+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/conflicting-advice-regarding-timing-of-blueblocker-use.12559/post-152316>

>
> I don't think that's possible for her.. we have well water and she's never taken fluoride supplements.. and despite my wishes that she brushed twice a day faithfully, she does not, so I'm sure it can't be that.

Fluoride is also in other things, like nonstick pans, clothes and furniture (upholstery) that has stain guards on it. [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Perfluorinated\_compound](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Perfluorinated_compound)

There are many endocrine disrupters besides Fl too that can cause earlier menstruation.....

I'm hoping it's just a genetic thing. My mother in law was also 10 years old. She moved here from Poland during WWII when she was 13, and was raised much more "old country" than we are here in the US, so I don't think she had been effected by anything to make her menstruate at that age. The more I read, the more glad I am that we live in this weird little time warp area here where nothing ever changes. Just one cell tower within four miles, nothing but corn fields and dairy farms and pine trees out here... well water (so, no chemicals).... etc.

Progress does not seem to be so progressive anymore.

Crazy.

Hope2Learn,

I am really no one to say this, but just reading this one post and a few before this, I'm very concerned about you, and your safety. Something is clearly going on with your husband, I don't know what. He sounds in a way like this: [http://psychcentral.com/disorders/borderline-personality-disorder-symptoms/](http://psychcentral.com/disorders/borderline-personality-disorder-symptoms/)

but who knows. It could be many things. Brain and gut are so closely related.

I don't know all your story, but I am a huge believer in the mind-body connection. And so I very much believe that the toxic relationship with your husband is one huge factor, if not the biggest, in all of your health issues. Including what you describe here. Your body is trying to protect you and is giving you certain symptoms.

I know this is easy to say and very hard to do, but have you gotten help for yourself in this? Further support on an emotional level by a professional? Can you separate? You say you feel better even within a day or two of being away from him. I think that is very telling.

The stress that this is causing you emotionally and physically may be making you sicker and sicker, if you keep allowing it. You may not be able to see it, but that is my concern. Though this is a very different situation, I was in a job for 6 years that was extremely stressful due to a horrible, disrespectful boss and every day there I felt awful...and all I did was look at my nutrition, the way I was eating. I didn't have the strength or brain to see this job was killing me. While the nutrition changes I made were not a bad idea, it was just a few drops on a fire. The real thing that I needed to change was the job, which I didn't until I was very sick and just couldn't stay there. It robbed me of my confidence, it caused a lot of inflammation in my brain - along with other things like bad air, artificial light etc - but it was a huge factor.

When your husband is shaming you, blaming you and treating you like this, it causes a stress response in your body, and raises cortisol.

Wearing blue blockers at night is great and everything else you will learn here, but it won't fix all the underlying stress I fear you have going on.

I say this from my heart - but please do whatever you can to get yourself to safety. I know it is so so hard to do so - I have had a friend in a similar situation and she's still with him bc of two little kids, but she is paying a very high, physical price for it. Get support. There is free support out there. There is a domestic ab.use hotline, other things. Even a church, or a community center.

One question I want to ask you - do you believe, in your heart, that you are worthy of love? Of respect? Of mutuality?

I hope you are not offended by this.....I know I am no one, but reading your posts here, I feel so burdened to say something, I cannot stay quiet.

((((((((Hugs)))))))))

Though this is a very different situation, I was in a job for 6 years that was extremely stressful due to a horrible, disrespectful boss and every day there I felt awful...and all I did was look at my nutrition, the way I was eating. I didn't have the strength or brain to see this job was killing me. While the nutrition changes I made were not a bad idea, it was just a few drops on a fire. The real thing that I needed to change was the job, which I didn't until I was very sick and just couldn't stay there. It robbed me of my confidence, it caused a lot of inflammation in my brain - along with other things like bad air, artificial light etc - but it was a huge factor.
>
> When your husband is shaming you, blaming you and treating you like this, it causes a stress response in your body, and raises cortisol.
>
> Wearing blue blockers at night is great and everything else you will learn here, but it won't fix all the underlying stress I fear you have going on.
>
> I say this from my heart - but please do whatever you can to get yourself to safety. I know it is so so hard to do so - I have had a friend in a similar situation and she's still with him bc of two little kids, but she is paying a very high, physical price for it. Get support. There is free support out there. There is a domestic ab.use hotline, other things. Even a church, or a community center.
>
> One question I want to ask you - do you believe, in your heart, that you are worthy of love? Of respect? Of mutuality?
>
> I hope you are not offended by this.....I know I am no one, but reading your posts here, I feel so burdened to say something, I cannot stay quiet.
>
> ((((((((Hugs)))))))))

I'm not offended, I'm thankful.

You're absolutely correct that most of my unwellness stems from the bad relationship. I am not a child of divorce, dont' know anyone who has been through one personally, or don't know anyone well, have no clue how it works, how to do it, deal with it, what's normal, etc. I also have no savings or income of my own and no family or friends to rely on for help short nor long term.

He's not abusive physically, though I used to fear that and at one point I called 911 because he had just lost his mind and I feared this would be the time he would hurt me. Since then he's clearly changed something because he's gained quite a lot of weight back and his body composition has drastically changed back to how I remember him before all this.

If his brain is normal then we may have a way to work things out. While it wasn't, we had no chance. Now that it seems he's changed some things that made him impossible, I have hope that we can try to get things back on track. We've been together 23+ years now, so it would be a shame to call it quits without doing absolutely everything possible to fix things.

HE's long maintained that my lack of sex drive is the whole problem, so we'll give it a shot with BHRT and see what happens. I told him yesterday though, if you keep acting like this it doesn't matter how horny I am, I will not want to waste that feeling on YOU becuase of resentment! So watch it, mister, or you're gonna shoot yourself in the foot here. I'm gonna end up with half of everything, all of the boobs, and a rockin' sex drive otherwise (and alimony to pay for it!).

 \*hugs\*

\*sigh\*

Since he has started to look like he stopped taking that crap, his snoring has come back bigtime. He had surgery for a deviated septum awhile back and then had a CPAP but still snored. The when he lost all the weight and went on this junk and started exercising, he stopped snoring for the most part.

But now we're back to the same old horror story of me not sleeping because of it.

Strange and interesting. I don't think it's putting a bit of weight back on.. it's not like he has fat inside his nostrils. Wonder what the real story is?

Thank you, I really hope so too... that is too bad about your ex husband... I'm sure divorce is no fun, I don't even know where to begin thinking about that with my parents, grandparents, a sibling, so many people already dead in my life.

My husband is an alcoholic. He quit in 2008 but several times the past few months he's come home reeking of alcohol, including the night I finally called 911. He knows he cannot drink, because I will not stay and because he becomes completely irrational and seems to honestly think stuff from 20 years ago just happened. He sometimes accuses me of saying and doing things that I have never said or done and it's like I'm talking to a crazy person. Only when he combines something with alcohol, and I don't know what it is.

The past several weeks almost every day he reeks of some sort of liquor which is weird because he doesn't drink liquor, never has, and it doens't smell like anything in particular, just a rather alcoholic breath scent. He seems sober and swears he hasn't been drinking yet he reeks. (In the other past incidents he had finally admitted to drinking and said that he would stop, but now he says he's bewildered by the scent...)

I finally looked it up last night online and it said he could be in ketosis. How can that be if he quit all his garbage and is eating like a regular american, plus protein shakes and drinks? I don't know what to think. Finally I told him I don't want to argue over whether the alcohol breath is or isn't from alcohol, I can't live with the breath stench so whatever it is make it stop, because he admits to nothing and thinks that if I can't prove something, then I can't know something, and therefor he doens't have to admit it, and that makes it all true.

I should start living that way. "Oh you can't prove it so it's not true". hrumph. yeah right!

### Hope2Learn — 2015-01-10T16:55:24+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/conflicting-advice-regarding-timing-of-blueblocker-use.12559/post-152334>

> [Hope said:](/goto/post?id=152332)
>
> He sounds in denial, and is obviously hiding things from you. I see so many red flags here. I can understand why your friends may have given up - it is very hard to _**watch**_ someone in pain choose that pain every single day. I know I couldn't do it, not strong enough. Of course they could have other reasons, who knows. Enabling just enables people. Your husband won't get help until he is losing something big. Anything else just keeps him in denial, indulging in his issues. It is way easier to stay in a known misery than to choose to make a change and live in the unknown to create something better. This only happens if you believe you deserve better, and are worthy.
>
> No one can do the hard stuff for you. Even if you had someone talk to you every day, it is still YOU who have to decide and do things.....at the end of the day, the life we create comes from inside ourselves. Jack talks about this too......quotes about that are all over this place
>
> All the best to you! I won't waste your time on this front anymore, and wish you well.....

See, this is the problem.. The concept that someone like me chooses the situation. You learn real quick when a huge alcoholic roid-head with a crow bar gets in your face that you can either try to leave and die or stay put and live another day while working your escape plan. Don't presume too much.

There came a point where I was about to walk out the door with my stuff in trash bags that I realized I know what I have to do HERE to get food clothing and shelter, but I dont' know what I will have to stoop to out on the streets with no cash and nowhere to go. I have a better chance of being safe here, with the knowledge of how to stay that way, than homeless in negative wind chill weather with a child or two trailing along behind me.

Just for ONE thing. Some stuff like this a personn may not realize until they are faced with it themselves. No parents. No family. No friends. No organizations in a tiny little hick town. Nowhere to go.

Anyway, I am also through with the victim blaming.

I cannot possibly put all of my reasoning out there and don't feel the need to, but I still thank you for showing such kindness and compassion for the most part.

I thought it was ONLY an Irish thing and then I see you using it. Funny.............sounds cool thought

### Hope2Learn — 2015-01-10T18:26:15+0200

>
> I cannot possibly put all of my reasoning out there and don't feel the need to

Lemme just say... he and I have had 23+ years together.. only 4 or so have been like this.... otherwise I'd have been gone long ago. And I understand that hormonal issues can make a person freaking nuts/impossible, etc - I am a horror a lot of the time and that's why I want BHRT finally (and the week that I tried pill DHEA randomly to see how I felt, I became the most evil witch ever.. holy cow.. my thoughts were even skewed/superhuman.. scary as heck) - and I don't want to hold that against him even if he did it to himself.. because I don't think he knkew better how to deal with the stuff he was dealing with. Losing weight, getting back into shape, and some ED issues probably seemed like things he could treat himself this way and it backfired, hard.

Combining that with alcohol the few weeks he was doing so made him flip a switch that I'd never seen in him before and hope to never see again. (And no it's not a habit I don't think, I can always tell. It was a terrible time for us due to some family tragedies. He made a horrible choice to drink through it. I think he's learned that now.)

Now that he, I, and the police all know this, I want to try to see if we can fix our stuff together, with Jack's help.

I don't want to hold hormonal crap and alcohol against him yet, if he's willing to quit both and deal with his issues another, healthy, way. He's stood by me through hormonal crap too. It's worth a shot to see if we can do this together. I'm going to be 42, he'll be 45, both this month. I'm sure we need it. I'm going to get my doctor to run labs on him like he did on me, and see what we can do for him if he's open to it. Which he seems to be .. he's been listening to me read from Dr. K's book for days now, listening to podcasts with me, unplugging EMF nightmares around the house with me...

So I said I wasn't gonna explain all of my reasoning but that's the other aspect of it.

A second chance after all these years is important to me. But there will be no third.

### JanSz — 2015-01-11T02:51:59+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/conflicting-advice-regarding-timing-of-blueblocker-use.12559/post-152373>

> [Inger said:](/goto/post?id=152307)
>
> JanZ, I just needs to ask you..... one question, does it mean the boyfriend is better off when he takes the gel every day? And in addition the HCG? Gel only is no good idea? And for sure not like he does... in phases on and off...... (because that is what i think he does...)

Taking hormones should be done under doctor's supervision.
Or at least dose should be monitored by blood testing.
Proper dose of gel should be taken every day.
I think you mentioned on other post testim.
That would be:
[http://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC1477565/](http://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC1477565/)
Testim® 1% testosterone gel
Good starting dose would be 50gram gel=50mg testosterone

Rarely doctor's would advice use of HCG.
One can get HCG over internet, thanks to HCG weight loss theraphy.
It must be done by injection.
try
[http://www.reliablerxpharmacy.com/fertigyn-7318.html](http://www.reliablerxpharmacy.com/fertigyn-7318.html)
Fertigyn - 10000 i.u.
5 Ampoule/s US$ 132.30

get Bacteriostatic Water 2-3 30mL vials
package of sterile 10mL ampoules (Each HCG ampoule will need new 10mL vial and mixing syringe with needle)
mixing syringe with needle, either 5 or 10mL
few boxes of insulin syringes 3/10cc with 31Ga 5/16" long needle
alcohol wipes

clean table with good lite and lots of time
sterilize ampoule and one 10Ml vial (take of aluminum center cover)
and vial with BW
draw 5mL BW to syringe
break one ampoule of HCG
insert some water into ampoule with HCG powder
roll ampoule until powder dissolves
draw all back into syringe, roll syringe to mix content
insert needle into empty 10 cc vial, push slowly, let the stream go slowly over side of inclined vial
Store BW ampoule in the fridge for latter use
you have 5mL mixture 2000iu/cc=2000iu/100units

1cc=100units on insulin syringe
each 1cc=2000iu
each 25units=500iu
you want each syringe to have 500iu
Take 20 insulin syringes
Draw 25units to each syringe (last syringe will be missing 2-3 units, do not worry.

Each week inject two syringes, one today next about 3.5 days latter
Be accurate to the day not to the hour.

Store filled syringes in the glass in the freezer.
20 syringes will last 10 weeks
5 ampoules will last 50 weeks
Shipping is expensive, buy once a year or once every 2 years.

### JanSz — 2015-01-11T02:58:15+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/conflicting-advice-regarding-timing-of-blueblocker-use.12559/post-152374>

Hope2Learn;
well, you have a full plate for sure.
There is a thing, so is your husband. Hang it there, hang in there and be strong for both of you.
He is likely lost and may actually need more help than you do.
Really, no sense of breaking family.
Real quick way to find your self on the street with welfare check in hand (you, your children and your husband).
Nobody wins.
I would say try to work out a deal where you are honest with each other, and straight shooter.
Straigh talk does not come easy for some ladies. Talking like a lady does not come easy for man.
Even worst when both are scared, confused and not sure.
That is why they say that man is from Mars and women from Venus.
No hiding anything or lying. Lying is easy to spot and ruins trust.
Promise him that he can have a sex with you any time, if you want or not, and you will make it always pleasant experience.
That should take lots of arguing out and he should calm down. He may actually open up and tell you what troubles him.
It is indeed very likely that both of you need hormonal optimization theraphy.
Hopefully your finances will allow for that.
Taking stuff that you husband may be buying from guys in the gym is not only not smart, but it will for sure hurt him.
You both need doctor that would run blood tests for both of you and give you scripts for what you are missing.

When you get to that point you may want to post your test results and your doctor's opinion and I will give you my take.
I am not a doctor, I am 75yo man in NJ USA, originally from Poland. I deal with my hormones since early 2000.
You do not need special doctor. It may be your GP that you already know. As long as he is willng to help.
I and likely others will give you some pointers and you could take them to your doctor as suggestions for his review.
Lots of items you can buy over internet, you just need blood tests to see how much to take.

Yes, low hormones seen by some doctors may result in script for antidepressat (man or woman).
Often that is very wrong diagnosis, will result in more problems, and render man impotent.

Bad breath may be from variety of reasons
bad tooth, alcohol, some foods, ketosis.

Hang in there.

### Inger — 2015-01-11T09:43:58+0200

> [JanSz said:](/goto/post?id=152373)
>
> Taking hormones should be done under doctor's supervision.
> Or at least dose should be monitored by blood testing.
> Proper dose of gel should be taken every day.
> I think you mentioned on other post testim.
> That would be:
> [http://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC1477565/](http://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC1477565/)
> Testim® 1% testosterone gel
> Good starting dose would be 50gram gel=50mg testosterone
>
> Rarely doctor's would advice use of HCG.
> One can get HCG over internet, thanks to HCG weight loss theraphy.
> It must be done by injection.
> try
> [http://www.reliablerxpharmacy.com/fertigyn-7318.html](http://www.reliablerxpharmacy.com/fertigyn-7318.html)
> Fertigyn - 10000 i.u.
> 5 Ampoule/s US$ 132.30
>
> get Bacteriostatic Water 2-3 30mL vials
> package of sterile 10mL ampoules (Each HCG ampoule will need new 10mL vial and mixing syringe with needle)
> mixing syringe with needle, either 5 or 10mL
> few boxes of insulin syringes 3/10cc with 31Ga 5/16" long needle
> alcohol wipes
>
> clean table with good lite and lots of time
> sterilize ampoule and one 10Ml vial (take of aluminum center cover)
> and vial with BW
> draw 5mL BW to syringe
> break one ampoule of HCG
> insert some water into ampoule with HCG powder
> roll ampoule until powder dissolves
> draw all back into syringe, roll syringe to mix content
> insert needle into empty 10 cc vial, push slowly, let the stream go slowly over side of inclined vial
> Store BW ampoule in the fridge for latter use
> you have 5mL mixture 2000iu/cc=2000iu/100units
>
> 1cc=100units on insulin syringe
> each 1cc=2000iu
> each 25units=500iu
> you want each syringe to have 500iu
> Take 20 insulin syringes
> Draw 25units to each syringe (last syringe will be missing 2-3 units, do not worry.
>
> Each week inject two syringes, one today next about 3.5 days latter
> Be accurate to the day not to the hour.
>
> Store filled syringes in the glass in the freezer.
> 20 syringes will last 10 weeks
> 5 ampoules will last 50 weeks
> Shipping is expensive, buy once a year or once every 2 years.

Losing weight, getting back into shape, and some ED issues probably seemed like things he could treat himself this way and it backfired, hard.

(And no it's not a habit I don't think, I can always tell. It was a terrible time for us due to some family tragedies. He made a horrible choice to drink through it. I think he's learned that now.)
>

It's worth a shot to see if we can do this together. I'm going to be 42, he'll be 45, both this month. I'm sure we need it. I'm going to get my doctor to run labs on him like he did on me, and see what we can do for him if he's open to it. Which he seems to be .. he's been listening to me read from Dr. K's book for days now, listening to podcasts with me, unplugging EMF nightmares around the house with me...
>
> So I said I wasn't gonna explain all of my reasoning but that's the other aspect of it.
>
> A second chance after all these years is important to me. But there will be no third.

Hi Hope2Learn. My husband went kinda nuts a few years ago. It seemed like he would do anything to make me upset. Once that happened, his job was done, and he was just fine.

I was bewildered. But things came to a head, and the issues were all resolved, eventually. We are as happy as clams now. I think he was experiencing quite a bit of anxiety, and his responses were designed to 'get control' of the situation, though they were actually doing the opposite. I watch out for any stray controlling tendencies now, and make sure when I see them that he is hydrated, fed properly, has been outside in the sun, etc.

Anxiety doesn't have to be an emotional response. Our cells, if under distress, are capable of generating a system-wide anxiety. I think our bodies do a lot to get us to pay attention and change our circumstances. We just misunderstand.

I hope you can get safely away from him, or that you can help him become more healthy. I'm sure the man you married is still in there somewhere, but he has to want to change.

It has not helped his attitude one bit, so I respectfully submit that your suggestion, fi indeed I am reading it correctly, is unhelpful in execution to such an extent that I resent every sexual encounter due to it being expected and undeserved, and due to the fact that he is still a total dick to me.

# Thread: Leaky Gut Protocol & Optimizing Ketosis
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/leaky-gut-protocol-optimizing-ketosis.12560/>
**Subforum:** Adrenal Rx and Leaky Gut Rx
**Posts:** 19
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Haley — 2015-01-08T15:42:01+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/leaky-gut-protocol-optimizing-ketosis.12560/post-152097>

Hi everyone,

I have a lot of questions and am not sure where to post all of them so I am going to start here with diet.

I have been paleo for over 5 years now and have had my experiments with ketosis/vlc-the longest duration being about 2 months or so. Generally this boils down to me eliminating my evening serving of kabocha squash. So when not attempting ketosis I am already pretty low carb. I do however eat a LOT of veggies (broccoli, green beans, kale, bok choy-low FODMAP because I think it seems to help with my notorious bloating issue). I do understand that to be in ketosis I can't eat the amount of veggies I usually do so I have cut it down to be just under 30g carbs/day from them.

My daily diet is pretty boring, looks something like this:
12oz grass fed beef
1 can sardines
3 servings of veggies
coconut oil or coconut butter

I am fairly certain I have AI issues: hidradenitis suppurativa, thyroid probs, possible celiac (as i react strongly and have a grandmother with the disease) and maybe some others. Which is why I have adopted such a strict diet...no chocolate (even organic cacao seems to cause HS flare) and many other foods (even common veggies) because of the gut issues the AI is causing me. I've suspected candida (been doing a cleanse with an herbal antibiotic protocol for 2 months now), a virus, bacteria like h pylori, sibo, parasites...anything. And so i figured a strict diet like this would wipe out whatever it is. But i'm not confident it has. I still struggle to loose the bit of weight (despite eating betw 1000-1300 cals/day)..dont have great energy and when I went from Colorado (where I live) to Houston for 10 days all of my old terrible symptoms came back-it was mad!

I guess my questions would be:

\-What can I add in to supplement my current regimen (diet wise) that would be safe for someone with an AI and Leaky Gut? I hear others talking about raw seafood and chocolate and wine and I continue to tell myself I can't do that.

\-Because of my poor experiences with ketosis in the past & several articles i've read-I have a lot of fear when it comes to ketosis. Like I might be putting my already shot adrenals further into irreversible repair. How is this ketosis different? Is it because I am to be adding seafood, limiting EMFs and getting more natural light?

\-My sleep always gets disrupted when attempting ketosis. My understanding it is because my liver is at work trying to my glucose. What is the best way to fix this? Or is my body trying to tell me ketosis is not a good thing?

Thank you for any input you may have for me!

### Haley — 2015-01-08T15:45:07+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/leaky-gut-protocol-optimizing-ketosis.12560/post-152101>

I would like to add that i don't eat 12ox of grass fed beef a day-but rather rotate between chicken, turkey, lamb, beef and (now) fish.

### Inger — 2015-01-08T18:46:29+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/leaky-gut-protocol-optimizing-ketosis.12560/post-152124>

I would ditch the chicken and the turkey....... usually they get crap feed... grains, hormones etc. Pastured beef and lamb is great but I would rather do their organs..... they are way better for you and even cheaper! Heart is delicious, and liver too.

Instead of all the veggies i would eat seaweeds. Raw fresh are best but raw dried and soaked are great too. That is what i do. Then wild herbs/greens if you can find them in a unpolluted area. I eat them almost every day, i am eating close to zero veggies but raw onion and cucumber. Wild edibles are very nutritious dense.... from a handfull you get more good stuff than fromva huge bowl of veggies i would say!
And they are fresh and full of life directly from the ground..... full of life force

Do as much seafood as you can! And yes, raw is better. I do canned only in emergency. You can make delicious meals from raw seafood...... I mostly add just ACV/lime juice and salt and if it is not a fatty seafood i add some EVOO or/and butter

I guess you need more fat....... can you do grassfed butter? Or grassfed beef fat?

I am doing lots of butter lately as an experiment...lots.... i have 50 grams in my morning coffee.. i have only that for breakfast.... then I eat raw seafood... seaweeds, wild herbs.. some organs.. occasionally grassfed meat... lots of it.... and i feel amazing! If you can get oysters - they are the best food ever

1000-1300 calories is very little... i bet i am at 2000 + most days..... and i weigh 55 kg or less / 166 cm (was last time i weighed a few months ago but i have lost fat since then)

Are you doing CT? That would be a very smart thing to do........

For good sleep lots of daylight in your eyes and darkness after sunset are great! Be outside in the nature as much as you can (in rain and in sun!) when it is light outside, and after sunset keep it dark and use blue blockers.....

### Inger — 2015-01-08T18:52:58+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/leaky-gut-protocol-optimizing-ketosis.12560/post-152126>

> \-Because of my poor experiences with ketosis in the past & several articles i've read-I have a lot of fear when it comes to ketosis. Like I might be putting my already shot adrenals further into irreversible repair. How is this ketosis different? Is it because I am to be adding seafood, limiting EMFs and getting more natural light?

yep. DHA makes the difference.. avoiding fake light.... getting natural light in your eyes instead... and CT would be huge too. CT needs to come with ketosis too.

Do not forget to drink LOTS of natural spring or well water (RO is great too) the colder the better

### Haley — 2015-01-09T01:47:37+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/leaky-gut-protocol-optimizing-ketosis.12560/post-152172>

Inger-thank you for your response!

The turkey and chicken I buy are antibiotic/hormone free but yes probably grain fed as I don’t think they sell “bug fed” chickens here lol. I do try and consume more red meat than bird meat. I have tried organ meats but am always skeptical about the sources. However I do have access to some local grassfed liver. What about bone broth? Haven’t made any in a while!

On my walk in the snow this morning I was pondering the likelihood that I would not be consuming veggies this time of year 1000s of years ago. (one exception i did think of was winter squash as it does store very well-any thoughts?). But getting rid of my veggies would be extremely difficult for me as I rely on their fiber and nutrients! Maybe I just need more time and scientific evidence before I can take that leap. I also try and avoid raw as my digestion is rather crappy. When you say bitters…could you give me some examples and where I might find them?

I can get grassfed fat at a local health food store. But what would I be putting it on if I’m not eating veggies? Meat? It seems unhealthy to me to be adding BEEF fat to say..FISH..just doesn’t seem natural.

While on the topic of fish, after doing a lot of reading about the microbiome’s importance and how bacteria affect us i have to say i don’t know if I’m willing to eat raw meats especially if they have been sitting out in open air at the grocery store. How does one justify and dive into this?

I eat such a low calorie diet because of my past with eating disorders-it has gotten me to where my body gains like crazy when I increase or get out of control. I understand there is more to a calorie but the fact is with where I am right now any more and i will gain.

I feel pretty good about the other factors-sunlight, walking, etc. I live in colorado and take walks and get in the sunlight often during the day. Allowing myself to get cold too and not using the heater near as much. But I know i need to work on eliminating EFTs at night-sooo difficult!!!

Also- I would love for someone to address the keto/insomnia issue as this is really going to decline my health quickly if i don’t address it.

Thank you so much for the help guys. So many questions, so much to learn. It can be a bit exhausting after 6 years of struggling!:/

### Lahelada — 2015-01-09T02:01:40+0200

### Linz — 2015-01-09T11:41:04+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/leaky-gut-protocol-optimizing-ketosis.12560/post-152207>

Hayley, I think you need to concentrate on the circadian context. Ketosis goes with winter and cold, dark conditions. Cold promotes uncoupling so you burn free heat (brown fat) rather than storing fat or increasing inflammation. Do some cold water ct and see if you feel glowing heat generation in the night. Fat provides lots of electrons to keep the system running. With cold you need lots of fat. In summer lots of sunlight helps protect from the excess inflammation due to more carbs in the diet provided cell membrane potential (redox) is high enough. At the moment perhaps you should work on boosting your redox potential (leptin reset - daily timing issues).

There is a seasonal context to the fats too. Mid winter you want more omega 3, in autumn omega 6 can be higher (nuts etc) and saturated fats are fine in summer. You are right about not mixing fish with sat fats as they block the omega 3s from the fish. Use olive oil or ghee (if OK with your ai diet) or bacon fat with the fish. Coconut oil is really a summer fat but Dr K says it can be used all year round with ai issues - also cold and ketosis can be maintained all year with ai. Forget the calorie aspect and add lots of fats to your green vegetables and never skim broths.

Sorry I can't help with the eating disorder aspect except that I think understanding the cold/burning off heat rather than gaining weight link along with lots of DHA will help. Sleeping well requires cold and dark but it is difficult to tolerate cold if you can't generate free heat well

### Haley — 2015-01-09T15:54:33+0200

Linz- I really appreciate you laying all that out for me in such a way I could understand. Thank you!

For the last few months I have felt real confident about my circadian rhythm as I have been going to bed around 9-930and waking 6:30-8 feeling rested and ready to go in the morning. I would love to try ghee again-does anyone have experience with it not affecting them when dairy is an issue?

One thing that might help... eat like a person who lives off the land and doesn't go into grocery stores. If something doesn't grow during winter there, do not eat it during winter. If something isn't native to your environment (like maybe corn or macadamia nuts or something that only grows certain places), take it out of your diet. If "Cavemen Callag" would not have been able to eat something, you should not either. Jack points out in his book that human brains evolved faster than human bodies, in a way, because our brains let us create environments that our bodies haven't had the time to evolve to be able to process properly yet.

I found that to be incredibly sensible, personally!

# Thread: CFS and D3 Puzzle...

### David H — 2015-01-12T07:24:39+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/cfs-and-d3-puzzle.12583/post-152475>

I'm new here, so first I'll say hello! And sorry to start out on such a low note :-(

I've had CFS for almost 7 years and most of the associated symptoms. Hypersomnia 10+ hours, daytime fatigue, weakness, brain fog, neck pain, etc... Recently I decided to finally address my low D3 levels and on the 2nd day I had complete remission of all symptoms. This lasted for 3 days and then I relapsed. I now relapse and remit but there doesn't seem to be a pattern. The initial D3 was 8,000 IU, I've done lower and higher but it doesn't seem to help maintain remission. Also trying co-factors, especially Mg, to see if it helps but not so far.

This happened before with the liver support supplement Super Thisilyn (milk thistle, methionine, ALA, NAC, herbs). Similar in that I got great periods of remission but could not maintain it.

So, any ideas to what's going on? Glutathione, immune system, HPA, antimicrobial, mitochondria? I'll add some possibly relevant details below. Thank you in advance to anybody that can help solve this puzzle!

-   Clonazepam for 7 years, stopped in 2011
-   low D3 (16-24 ng/dL)
-   low TIBC and UIBC
-   almost all amino acids low on NutrEval except glutamic acid
-   TSH usually high but in range
-   low but in range free T3 and T4
-   very low neurotransmitters on urine test
-   constipation, high small intestinal methane gas
-   low reduced/high oxidized glutathione
-   MTHFR C677T heterozygous
-   elevated EBV, CMV, C. Pneumonia antibodies
-   Omega fatty acids good on NutrEval except very low DGLA
-   Perfect Health Diet 3.5 years

### Jack Kruse — 2015-01-12T17:15:59+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/cfs-and-d3-puzzle.12583/post-152538>

Here is what I will say: Cholesterol and Vitamin D3 are nearly identical in chemical structure. Most people do not know this. The only difference is a single double bond in the second ring of the cholesterol backbone. This gives Vitamin D _**one less hydrogen atom**_ than the closed ring of cholesterol. After reading Tensegrity 6 that should make you think. One hydrogen is the only difference at the atomic scale. Here you will see the wisdom of Tensegrity 6 play its role. Hydrogen is the ultimate chameleon for cholesterol and Vitamin D3. What does it do? Everyone with this disease can't make pregnenolone from LDL cholesterol because they have pregnenolone steal syndrome..........all tied to the redox potential. When redox is low that one less hydrogen can't do what nature allows it to normally do.

**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/cfs-and-d3-puzzle.12583/post-152540>

Vitamin D3 is synthesized from cholesterol in the skin upon exposure to _**specific frequencies**_ of sunlight. (Noticed it is not diet related) When this happens and calcium is normal, both molecules remain sulfated. **DON’T FORGET THIS. THIS HYDROGEN INTERACTION WITH and WITHIN THE SUN IS HUGE.**

### Josh — 2015-01-12T17:59:23+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/cfs-and-d3-puzzle.12583/post-152543>

This is really important and relevant from FB:

> -   Most alternative practitioners [Danny Scollan](https://www.facebook.com/danny.scollan) do not know the biophysics of how divalent cations and interact non native EMF. They blame on things that are not the proximal cause and this is part of the reason why some MD's remain skeptical of alternative claims. For example the non native radiation from handsets or blue tooth devices can affect the whole body because it conducts electricity and behaves like an antenna. It absorbs the radiation and generates eddy currents that can flow beyond the site of application. When they impinge on cell membranes, they weaken them by removing structurally important calcium and other divalent ions. This makes the membranes more likely to leak, which can give many biological effects. The human body makes a good antenna since blood vessels, which are low resistance pathways filled with a highly conductive salty fluid, connect virtually all of its parts. Even cell membranes, which have a high resistance to DC, allow radio‐frequencies through because of their high capacitance. This biophysics is not well known in most healthcare circles but there is a ton published about it and no one is making the connection. Instead we still see bad science on parasites, metals, and foods that cause a leaky gut. Allan Frey showed the basic science for the condition 50 years ago in military studies. It is known, just not well known by those who should make it their business to know better.
>     [30 mins](https://www.facebook.com/groups/872967099382852/permalink/940057089340519/?comment_id=940303929315835&offset=0&total_comments=10) · [Like](https://www.facebook.com/groups/872967099382852/940312239315004/?notif_t=group_activity#) · [1](https://www.facebook.com/browse/likes?id=940303929315835)
> -
>     [Jack Kruse](https://www.facebook.com/jack.kruse?fref=ufi)When you keep blaming foods for this condition you are showing a lack of scientific rigor. Sorry to be blunt but it must be said. Many hundreds of scientific studies suggest that the first effect of the eddy currents is to generate small alternating voltages across the cell membranes, which increase their permeability. This can have serious metabolic consequences as unwanted substances diffuse into and out of cells unhindered, and materials in different parts of the cell, that should be kept separate, become mixed. But how do these tiny alternating voltages increase membrane permeability?.
>     The answer lies in their ability to remove calcium ions from the membrane surface. We have known since the work of Suzanne Bawin and her co‐workers (Bawin et al. 1975) that electromagnetic radiation that is far too weak to cause significant heating can nevertheless remove radioactively labelled calcium ions from cell membranes. Later, Carl Blackman showed that this occurs only with weak radiation, and then only within one or more ‘amplitude windows’, above and below which there is little or no effect (Blackman et al. 1982; Blackman 1990). Then there is Becker Liboff (see Liboff et al. 1990) Wertheimer and Savitz work.
>     [30 mins](https://www.facebook.com/groups/872967099382852/permalink/940057089340519/?comment_id=940304165982478&offset=0&total_comments=10) · [Like](https://www.facebook.com/groups/872967099382852/940312239315004/?notif_t=group_activity#) · [1](https://www.facebook.com/browse/likes?id=940304165982478)
> -
>     [Jack Kruse](https://www.facebook.com/jack.kruse?fref=ufi)Calcium ions are positively charged calcium atoms. Free calcium ions normally occur in calcium salts but, like other positive ions, they can also bind to the negatively charged membranes of living cells. These membrane‐bound ions are in chemical equilibrium with the corresponding free ions in the surrounding medium, but there is a disproportionately large amount of calcium because it has two positive charges (i.e. it is divalent), which attracts it more strongly to the negative membrane. Most of the other readily available ions in living cells (e.g. potassium) have only one charge (i.e. they are monovalent). However, the extra charges on the divalent ions such as calcium and magnesium are literally their undoing. They let weak alternating electromagnetic fields remove them selectively from the membrane, which can have dire metabolic consequences.
>     [29 mins](https://www.facebook.com/groups/872967099382852/permalink/940057089340519/?comment_id=940304252649136&offset=0&total_comments=10) · [Like](https://www.facebook.com/groups/872967099382852/940312239315004/?notif_t=group_activity#)
> -
>     [Jack Kruse](https://www.facebook.com/jack.kruse?fref=ufi)A simple way to explain the selective removal of divalent ions is to imagine trying to harvest ripe apples by shaking the tree. If you don’t shake it hard enough, no apples fall off, but if you shake it too hard, they all fall off. However, if you get it just right, only the ripe ones fall off and are ‘selectively harvested’. .
>     We can apply the same logic to the positive ions bound to cell membranes. Alternating voltages try to drive these ions off and then back onto the membranes with each half cycle. If the voltage is too low, nothing happens. If it is too high, all the ions fly off, but return when the voltage reverses. However, if it is just the right, it will tend to remove only the more strongly charged ones, such as divalent calcium with its double charge. Since at least some of these divalent ions will probably be replaced at random by other ions when the field reverses, there will be a net removal of divalent cations. However this occurs only within a narrow range of field strength to give an amplitude window. .
>     There may be more than one window. Blackman discovered at least two for calcium removal from brain tissue. This may be because not all membranes are alike; for example, some may hold their calcium more firmly and need a stronger field to remove them. Also, the local availability of other ions to replace the calcium may affect the ease with which it is removed. Nevertheless, the general effect is that electromagnetic exposure within an amplitude window reduces the amount of calcium bound to the membrane.
>     [29 mins](https://www.facebook.com/groups/872967099382852/permalink/940057089340519/?comment_id=940304419315786&offset=0&total_comments=10) · [Like](https://www.facebook.com/groups/872967099382852/940312239315004/?notif_t=group_activity#)

[https://www.facebook.com/groups/872967099382852/940312239315004/?notif\_t=group\_activity](https://www.facebook.com/groups/872967099382852/940312239315004/?notif_t=group_activity)

### Jack Kruse — 2015-01-12T21:29:46+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/january-2015-webinar.12595/post-152581>

How much do you know about GPS? Did you know that your own GPS system is what controls your circadian cycles and every single biochemical reaction in your body. This includes how the organ clocks and how they yoke to the SCN..................

I have a sense all the complex blogs and going to make this webinar popular. You will now know why circadian signals trump food.

It is a counterintuitive position I hold dear.

So in your life you think you can also find solitude when you want it. But you're also mistaken.........no matter where you are in this world or how remote you may be you are connected to wave forms from the planet atmosphere and from space. Those connections or lack of connection via your choice are what create the life you get and live. This also will be hard for people to swallow.

Hard core scientist don't believe in magic. I do believe in an everyday sort of natural magic that is based in the most fundamental principles of QED -- the inexplicable connectedness we sometimes experience with places, people, works of art and the like; the eerie appropriateness of moments of synchronicity; the whispered voice, the hidden presence, when we think we're alone, yet we never are...............

Many believe we can dream by night, and escape your life, and we can dream by day is to make life happen...........both are false. We are always connected to an energy source whether we sense it or not.

I believe it is the natural unknown reality that draws us to science and biology. We just are yet to capture her whisper of how things really work.

Many stories we unfold in webinars magnify nature's recipes.

Everything made by human hands looks terrible under this type of magnification--crude, rough, and asymmetrical. But in nature every bit of life is lovely and flowing. And the more magnification we use, the more details are brought out, perfectly formed.

Modern science is so confident in what they think they know it breeds overconfidence in human thought and blurs out the risk inherit in it. When you come here to see my thoughts, I show you how little we really know, and in the light, our inferiority magnifies our species modern risk.

### Josh — 2015-01-14T03:08:29+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/january-2015-webinar.12595/post-152702>

For me, elevation has had a profound effect on my cognitive function and mood. I became the most depressed and unstable when living at 6650 feet in the Rockies=suicide belt. At sea level I am never quite right. At 9000 plus I fly, but have never spent more than a couple weeks at that altitude without a break. At my current altitude of 4300 feet with 340 days of sun, I am perhaps the most stable and balanced that I have ever been. There are many other factors, but I notice the difference when I descend to Phoenix at 2500  or ascend to the Mogollon Rim and Colorado Plateau at 7000+. I will have to scale this data into the current webinar and see what I come up with. I seem to enjoy bright light at altitude more than at sea level.

### Josh — 2015-01-14T19:57:54+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/january-2015-webinar.12595/post-152749>

After a second listen, the implications for how our body receives light and temperature and its interpretation seems more finely nuanced than ever. I always notice how differrent I feel when I buzz my hair down to 10mm. I feel a noticeable difference when I go to 4mm or even shaved. I always have felt as if I had a blanket on my head when I allow my hair to grow longer. I notice similar affects with different body coverings including different types of materials, thicknesses, areas and covered and more. Above all is the difference between blocking the eyes with a dark full block blindfold and not. I need to do this a couple of times most days to feel in balance. I imagine that this blocks the input to the SCN and changes the PVN output and more. I often open my eyes into blackness inside of the blindfold I use and this feels shall we say "relaxing"...The webinar suggest that we can really fine tune the messages to our system all the way down the scales if we understand how it works and at what gradient it responds. Quite thrilling really.... It begins to prove much of what is claimed, but inconsistently delivered by traditional medical systems such as Oriental Medicine.....
